title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Confirmed as Director of Curriculum and Instruction via Kemp ISD administration staff page. Email inferred from district domain pattern (firstname.lastname@kempisd.org); verify before outreach. Kemp ISD operates a Head Start program for 3- and 4-year-olds. District office: 1545 South State Highway 274, Kemp, TX 75143. Verify email at https://www.kempisd.org/apps/pages/index.jsp?uREC_ID=409535&type=d&pREC_ID=staff.

title: Early Childhood Program Coordinator
notes: Confirmed via Rockwall ISD Early Childhood-PreK Education page as Early Childhood Program Coordinator. RISD curriculum uses Conscious Discipline (SEL) and Texas PreK Guidelines aligned program. CLI Engage Circle Progress Monitoring used 3x/year. For senior decision-maker, see also Dr. Mary Pugh, Senior Executive Director of Elementary Curriculum and Instruction.

title: Director / Administrator, Perkins Early Childhood Center
notes: Princeton ISD operates two early childhood centers (Canup ECC and Perkins ECC). Perkins admin contact: amada.guzman@princetonisd.net. Canup ECC admin contact: abolan@princetonisd.net. District-level Curriculum & Instruction department exists but specific Director name not confirmed via public sources. Recommend verifying via princetonisd.net/directory for an Executive Director of C&I level contact.

title: Director of Early Childhood & Learning Services
notes: Confirmed via LinkedIn and ZoomInfo as Director of Early Childhood & Learning Services at Prosper ISD. Previously Principal at Jim Spradley Elementary. Prosper ISD operates Calhoun Early Childhood School (CAECS). Email pattern firstname.lastname@prosper-isd.net standard for district. District office: 605 E. Seventh St., Prosper, TX 75078.

title: Executive Director of Elementary Education
notes: Confirmed via Northwest ISD Executive Team page. Oversees elementary education including ECE/PreK programs. NISD is opening a new Hicks Early Childhood Center. For senior C&I decision-maker, also see Dr. Michael Griffin (Asst Supt Curriculum & Instruction, mgriffin@nisdtx.org, 817-215-0981). District office: 2001 Texan Drive, Justin, TX 76247.

title: Assistant Superintendent for Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Confirmed via Aledo ISD administration pages. C&I department located at 1008 Bailey Ranch Rd, Aledo TX 76008. Email inferred from district domain pattern; Aledo ISD has removed staff emails from main pages for security. Aledo ISD Child Development Center uses Frog Street Curriculum. ECE Director: Becky Albertson (ralbertson@aledoisd.org, 817-207-3416).

title: Director of Teaching & Learning
notes: Confirmed as Director of Teaching & Learning (formerly Director of Curriculum) via Granbury ISD Teaching & Learning page. Joined T&L April 2021. Karla Willmeth is Assistant Director of Curriculum. Granbury ISD operates Roberson Early Learning Academy. District office: 600 W. Pearl St., Granbury, TX 76048.

title: Director of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Confirmed as Director of C&I via Eastland ISD 2025-2026 Employee Handbook. Email inferred from district domain pattern (firstname.lastname@eastlandisd.net). Superintendent: Jeremy Williams. Asst Supt: Mary Jones. Small district (~1,067 students PK-12) in Eastland County. District uses CSCOPE curriculum framework.

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Confirmed as Director of C&I per ZoomInfo. Previously Junior High Principal and South Elementary administrator at Breckenridge ISD. Email inferred from district domain pattern. District has East Elementary and South Elementary. Superintendent: Bryan Allen (Prairie Freeman named lone finalist Sept 2024). District office: 208 N. Miller Ave., Breckenridge, TX 76424.

title: Executive Director of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Confirmed as Executive Director of C&I via Gainesville ISD Central Administration page. C&I department coordinates curriculum, instruction, assessments, and professional development. District operates Head Start and Pre-K programs. District office: 800 S. Morris St., Gainesville, TX 76240.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small single-campus PK-12 rural district (~500 students) in Cooke County. No dedicated ECE director - superintendent is primary contact. Dr. Luis previously served as Asst Supt for Curriculum & Instruction at Elgin ISD before becoming Era's superintendent in 2021. District office: 101 Hawk Drive, Era, TX 76238.

title: Director of Elementary Education
notes: Confirmed as Director of Elementary Education via KXII March 2024 interview on early childhood enrollment. Sherman ISD is opening a new early childhood center in 2027-28 at former Wakefield Elementary site to consolidate PreK and Head Start. Currently operates Fred Douglass Early Childhood Center. Email inferred from district domain pattern (firstname.lastname@shermanisd.net).

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Confirmed as Asst Supt of C&I via Van Alstyne ISD staff pages. Rachel Sevarino serves as Elementary Curriculum Coordinator (also a possible alternate contact). Growing district in southern Grayson County. Email inferred from district domain pattern.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural PK-12 district in Navarro County. Mrs. Jackson has served as superintendent since 2017; 1991 Frost HS graduate who previously served as elementary principal overseeing K-12 curriculum alignment. No dedicated C&I director - superintendent handles curriculum oversight. Email inferred from district pattern; verify before outreach. District office: 208 N. Wyrick St., Frost, TX 76641.

title: Superintendent
notes: Very small 1A district (~160 students PK-12). No dedicated ECE staff - superintendent is primary contact. Mr. Jenkins has served as Superintendent since April 2008. District office: 105 W. Eaton St., Trinidad, TX 75163.

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Confirmed as Director of C&I via ZoomInfo. Also serves as Principal of Cumby Collegiate HS. District rebranded from Cumby ISD to Cumby Collegiate ISD in 2022. Small district (~450 students, 3 campuses) serving Hopkins and Hunt Counties. District office: 803 East Main, Cumby, TX 75433.

title: Curriculum Director
notes: Confirmed as Curriculum Director via TASA Career Center listing. District has an Early Childhood Family Engagement Plan. Leslie Watson serves as Assistant Superintendent of Schools (additional contact). District office: 3130 N. Main St., Paris, TX 75460.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small 2A PK-12 district (~475 students) in Bowie County, NE Texas. No dedicated ECE staff - superintendent is primary contact. David Segers is current superintendent per ZoomInfo (Chris Bradshaw listed in older 2022 records). Amanda Sanders listed as Curriculum Director per some sources (possible alternate). District office: 389 Houston Drive, Maud, TX 75567.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small K-12 district (~460 students) in Bowie County. No dedicated ECE staff - superintendent is primary contact. Mr. May approved as Superintendent in March 2022 with 17+ years of educational leadership. Replaced previous superintendent Rex Burks. District office: 7497 US Hwy 67 West, Simms, TX 75574.

title: Assistant Superintendent (Lone Finalist for Superintendent)
notes: Confirmed Assistant Superintendent at HJISD. Named lone finalist for Superintendent in April 2026, succeeding Brad McEachern (retiring). Dr. Cox has 20+ years in education; previously served as Chief Academic Officer and Region 5 Program Coordinator - good fit for curriculum-focused outreach. HJISD serves ~2,754 students in Sour Lake. District office: P.O. Box 2003, Sour Lake, TX 77659.

title: Executive Director of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Confirmed as Executive Director of C&I via Troup ISD Curriculum & Instruction page. Superintendent: Mrs. Tammy Jones. District serves ~1,074 students (2023-2024). Troup Elementary serves PreK-5. Email inferred from district domain pattern. District office: 101 E. Duval, Troup, TX 75789.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Confirmed as Asst Supt of C&I via Henderson ISD board reports. Previously principal at Henderson HS and Northside Elementary. Email inferred from district domain pattern (firstname.lastname@hendersonisd.org). Superintendent: Dr. Thurston Lamb. Amanda Wallace serves as Asst Supt of Personnel/Policy. District office: 300 Crosby Drive, Henderson, TX 75652.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural East Texas district (~723 students, 3 schools) in Harrison County. No dedicated C&I director - superintendent is primary contact. Jay Ratcliff named lone finalist after Brian Gray departed for White Oak ISD; replaced previous superintendent Craig Coleman. Email inferred from district domain pattern; verify before outreach. District main email: hisd@harletonisd.net.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural East Texas district (~750 students PK-12) in Shelby County (Piney Woods). District has C&I department but no dedicated director identified publicly - superintendent is primary contact. Email inferred from district domain pattern (note district uses .k12.tx.us, not .net). District office: 5322 Hwy 87 South, Shelbyville, TX 75973.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural district in Shelby County. No dedicated ECE director publicly identified - superintendent is primary contact. District has a Director of Curriculum, State Testing and Federal/State Special Programs position (alternate contact). District office: 11109 US Hwy 84 East, Joaquin, TX 75954.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural PK-12 district in Nacogdoches County. No dedicated ECE staff - superintendent is primary contact. District office: 16678 FM 225 South, Douglass, TX 75943.

title: Superintendent
notes: Very small rural district in Polk County. No dedicated ECE staff - superintendent is primary contact. Sarah Fulcher serves in business/finance role at the district. District office: 234 Katie Simpson, Goodrich, TX 77335.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural district (4 campuses) in Tyler County. No dedicated C&I director publicly listed - superintendent is primary contact. Candace Dagle serves as Director of Student Services (alternate contact). District office: 375 FM 3290 S., Warren, TX 77664.

title: Superintendent
notes: District serves ~2,040 students in Jefferson County. Note that district uses two email domains: @hjisd.net for district staff but Supt uses @hfhorns.net (athletics/branded domain). No dedicated C&I director publicly identified - superintendent is primary contact. Monica Kattner is Principal of HF Elementary. District office: 12552 First St., Hamshire, TX 77622.

title: Curriculum & Instruction Department
notes: District serves ~2,000 students PreK-12 in Liberty County (Tarkington Primary School serves EE-K, Tarkington Elementary serves 1-3). District has Curriculum & Instruction Department and posted a Secondary Director of Curriculum job; no current C&I director name confirmed publicly. Gloria Aleman (Admin Assistant to Superintendent) is initial contact - galeman@tarkingtonisd.net. Davis was named lone finalist for Superintendent in March 2022. Recommend Apollo.io lookup for current C&I director.

title: Director of Elementary Teaching and Learning
notes: Confirmed as Director of Elementary Teaching and Learning via Shepherd ISD staff page (Compass Crew). 27 years in education; BS Angelo State, M.Ed Educational Leadership from Wayland Baptist. Superintendent Dr. Jason Hewitt. District office: 1401 South Byrd, Shepherd, TX 77371.

title: Director of Early Childhood and Elementary Bilingual/ESL Program
notes: Confirmed via Galena Park ISD Early Childhood Department page. Oversees Pre-K (full day for 4-year-olds, half-day for 3-year-olds at select campuses) aligned with Texas Pre-K Guidelines. Deborah Lacy is Secretary to the Director. General PreK contact: prekinfo@galenaparkisd.com. District office: 14705 Woodforest Blvd., Houston, TX 77015.

title: Admin Asst. to Deputy Superintendent for Instruction
notes: Deer Park ISD operates a dedicated Early Childhood Center (Laura Burke ECC) and offers PreK across multiple elementary schools. District uses Reading Horizons and Bluebonnet Math as adopted ECE/elementary instructional resources. Deputy Supt for Instruction oversees curriculum but specific name not confirmed publicly - Melanie Austin (admin asst) serves as entry contact. Recommend Apollo.io lookup or call 832-668-7000 for Deputy Supt's direct contact. District office: 2800 Texas Avenue, Deer Park, TX 77536.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small West Texas district (~947 students, 3 schools PK-12) in Mitchell County. District was named 2025 Texas Outstanding School Board (TASA). Note district uses ESC14-hosted domain ccity.esc14.net, not a standalone domain. No dedicated ECE director publicly identified - superintendent is primary contact. General district email: cisdapps@ccity.esc14.net. Email pattern inferred (firstinitiallast@ccity.esc14.net); verify before outreach. District office: 534 E 11th St, Colorado City, TX 79512.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small West Texas district (~380 students) in Jones County. P-TECH model: students earn associate degrees from Cisco College alongside HS diploma (free 60 college hours). Note district uses ESC14-hosted domain hamlin.esc14.net for email despite hamlincollegiate.com website. No dedicated ECE staff - superintendent is primary contact. Partnership with Collegiate Edu-Nation. District office: 510 SW Ave. F, Hamlin, TX 79520.

title: Executive Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Confirmed as Executive Director of C&I via Alice ISD curriculum staff pages. BA and M.Ed Special Education/Principal Cert from Texas A&M-Kingsville. Four elementary campuses (PreK-5); district partners with Community Action for PreK students. Email inferred from district domain pattern. District office: 2 Coyote Trail, Alice, TX 78332.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small district (3 schools PK-12) in Wise County. No dedicated C&I director publicly identified - superintendent is primary contact. Dr. Brown holds Ed.D in Education Leadership from Texas Tech. District operates Alvord Elementary/Intermediate School. District office: 600 W. Pine St., Alvord, TX 76225.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small bilingual/bicultural district in El Paso County (1 elementary, 1 middle, 1 high). Dr. Troncoso earned PhD in Curriculum and Instruction from New Mexico State; 12 years at AISD as principal, asst supt, now supt. No dedicated ECE director - superintendent oversees curriculum. Jorge G. Reyes is Anthony Elementary principal. District office: 840 Sixth St., Anthony, TX 79821.

title: Superintendent
notes: Very small rural District of Innovation in Ellis County. Marshall is 8th Superintendent; 20-year district veteran (teacher, asst principal, HS principal). No dedicated ECE/C&I staff - superintendent is primary contact. Email inferred from district domain pattern. General district email: info@avalonisd.net. District office: 309 W. School Ave., Avalon, TX 76623.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural district (~817 students, 3 schools) in Brown County. Dr. Martin hired March 2020 (succeeded Tony Truelove). NOTE: Dr. Martin was named lone finalist for Maypearl ISD Superintendent in March 2026 with expected April 2026 start - leadership may be in transition; verify before outreach. J.B. Stephens Elementary is district elementary campus. District office: 200 East Hall St., Bangs, TX 76823.
